caption: The video captures a man standing behind a microphone, addressing an audience seated in front of him. He is wearing glasses and a white shirt with a dark vest adorned with intricate designs. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background. The audience, consisting of people with various hairstyles and clothing, listens attentively. A guitar is visible on a stand to the right of the speaker, suggesting that music might be part of the event. The atmosphere seems formal yet intimate, as the speaker engages with the attendees, possibly sharing a speech or performance. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen.
